tripOverview.intro: London beckons with its perfect blend of historic charm and modern vibrancy, offering romantic strolls along the Thames and cozy pub experiences. This cosmopolitan city welcomes LGBTQ+ travelers with open arms while serving incredible vegetarian cuisine from traditional British fare to authentic Indian dishes.
tripOverview.vibe: Experience London's romantic energy while savoring vegetarian delights and exploring LGBTQ+-friendly neighborhoods at your own adventurous pace.

destinationOverview.bestTime: April offers mild spring weather perfect for walking tours and outdoor markets with fewer crowds than summer.

attractions.name: Borough Market
attractions.desc: London's oldest food market with incredible vegetarian options and artisanal products.

attractions.name: Tower Bridge
attractions.desc: Iconic Victorian bridge offering stunning Thames views and romantic photo opportunities.

attractions.name: British Museum
attractions.desc: World-class museum housing treasures from ancient civilizations and cultures.

attractions.name: Westminster Abbey
attractions.desc: Historic royal church where monarchs have been crowned for nearly 1000 years.

destinationOverview.transportation: London's extensive public transport includes the Underground (Tube), buses, and river services with contactless payment accepted everywhere. Black cabs are iconic but expensive, while Uber operates widely throughout the city. Walking is often fastest for short distances in central London, and Boris bikes offer a romantic way to explore parks.
destinationOverview.tip: Get an Oyster Card or use contactless payment for seamless transport, and always stand right on escalators - Londoners take this seriously!
destinationOverview.safety: London is very safe for LGBTQ+ travelers with excellent emergency services and well-lit streets in tourist areas.
destinationOverview.airaloText: Stay connected with affordable eSIM data plans that activate instantly upon arrival in London.

days.intro: Start your London adventure with the city's most famous food market and riverside romance.

morning.name: Arrive at Heathrow
morning.desc: Land and take the Heathrow Express to Paddington Station.

morning.name: Check into Hotel
morning.desc: Drop bags and freshen up in Southwark area.

afternoon.name: Borough Market
afternoon.desc: Explore London's oldest food market with incredible vegetarian options.

afternoon.name: Southwark Cathedral
afternoon.desc: Visit this beautiful Gothic cathedral steps from the market.

evening.name: Thames Path Walk
evening.desc: Romantic sunset stroll along the river toward Tower Bridge.

evening.name: Dinner at Champor-Champor
evening.desc: Authentic Thai vegetarian cuisine in intimate candlelit setting.

days.tip: Borough Market gets crowded after 2pm, so arrive early for the best vegetarian samples and shorter queues.

days.intro: Discover London's royal heritage with iconic palaces and ceremonial sites.

morning.name: Westminster Abbey
morning.desc: Explore where British monarchs have been crowned for centuries.

morning.name: Houses of Parliament
morning.desc: Admire Big Ben and the Gothic architecture from Parliament Square.

afternoon.name: St. James's Park
afternoon.desc: Romantic lakeside lunch with views of Buckingham Palace.

afternoon.name: Buckingham Palace
afternoon.desc: Watch the Changing of the Guard ceremony if scheduled.

evening.name: Covent Garden
evening.desc: Street performers and romantic atmosphere in historic market.

evening.name: Pre-theatre dinner
evening.desc: Vegetarian fine dining at Rules Restaurant's veggie menu.

days.tip: Book Westminster Abbey tickets online in advance to skip queues and ensure entry during peak season.

days.intro: Cruise the Thames and explore the historic Tower of London with your loved one.

morning.name: Tower of London
morning.desc: See the Crown Jewels and learn about London's dramatic history.

morning.name: Tower Bridge Exhibition
morning.desc: Walk across the glass floor high above the Thames.

afternoon.name: Thames River Cruise
afternoon.desc: Romantic boat ride from Tower Bridge to Westminster Pier.

afternoon.name: London Eye
afternoon.desc: Share panoramic views of London from this iconic observation wheel.

evening.name: South Bank Walk
evening.desc: Stroll the riverside with street art and buskers for atmosphere.

evening.name: OXO Tower Restaurant
evening.desc: Romantic dinner with stunning river views and vegetarian options.

days.tip: Book London Eye fast-track tickets online and choose sunset time slot for the most romantic experience.

days.intro: Dive deep into London's world-class museums and vibrant cultural scene.

morning.name: British Museum
morning.desc: Explore ancient treasures and world cultures in this magnificent museum.

morning.name: Russell Square
morning.desc: Peaceful garden square perfect for a romantic coffee break.

afternoon.name: Tate Modern
afternoon.desc: Contemporary art in a stunning former power station building.

afternoon.name: Millennium Bridge
afternoon.desc: Cross this pedestrian bridge featured in Harry Potter films.

evening.name: Shakespeare's Globe
evening.desc: Experience theatre as the Bard intended in this authentic recreation.

evening.name: George Inn
evening.desc: Historic galleried coaching inn where Dickens once drank.

days.tip: Many London museums offer free admission but charge for special exhibitions - check what's included before booking.

days.intro: Explore London's incredible Indian food scene from street food to fine dining.

morning.name: Brick Lane
morning.desc: Walk the famous curry mile and see colorful street art.

morning.name: Beigel Bake
morning.desc: Try London's best bagels at this 24-hour institution.

afternoon.name: Brick Lane Food Tour
afternoon.desc: Guided tasting tour of authentic Bangladeshi and Indian cuisine.

afternoon.name: Spitalfields Market
afternoon.desc: Browse vintage finds and artisan goods in historic market.

evening.name: Shoreditch Street Art
evening.desc: Explore vibrant murals and urban art in trendy neighborhood.

evening.name: Dishoom
evening.desc: Bombay-style cafe with incredible vegetarian dishes and romantic ambiance.

days.tip: Book Dishoom in advance as they don't take reservations for dinner - arrive early or use their app to join the queue remotely.

days.intro: Discover London's secret spots and LGBTQ+-friendly neighborhoods off the beaten path.

morning.name: Leadenhall Market
morning.desc: Beautiful Victorian market that doubled as Diagon Alley in Harry Potter.

morning.name: Sky Garden
morning.desc: London's highest public garden with panoramic city views.

afternoon.name: Soho Exploration
afternoon.desc: Wander London's LGBTQ+ heart with rainbow crossings and historic pubs.

afternoon.name: Neal's Yard
afternoon.desc: Colorful hidden courtyard perfect for Instagram photos.

evening.name: G-A-Y Bar
evening.desc: Iconic LGBTQ+ venue for pre-dinner drinks in welcoming atmosphere.

evening.name: Yauatcha
evening.desc: Michelin-starred dim sum with stunning vegetarian options.

days.tip: Book Sky Garden visits free online in advance - slots fill up quickly but offer the best free views in London.

days.intro: Savor your last full day with romantic parks and memorable final dinner.

morning.name: Hyde Park
morning.desc: Romantic morning stroll through London's most famous royal park.

morning.name: Diana Memorial
morning.desc: Pay respects at the beautiful memorial garden dedicated to Princess Diana.

afternoon.name: Harrods Food Hall
afternoon.desc: Browse luxury foods and pick up gourmet vegetarian treats.

afternoon.name: Victoria & Albert Museum
afternoon.desc: World's largest museum of decorative arts and design.

evening.name: Kensington Gardens
evening.desc: Peaceful gardens perfect for reflecting on your London adventure.

evening.name: The Ivy
evening.desc: Iconic London restaurant with excellent vegetarian menu for farewell dinner.

days.tip: Pack light snacks from Harrods for your flight tomorrow and don't forget to buy British tea as souvenirs.

days.intro: Final morning in London before heading home with unforgettable memories.

morning.name: Check out
morning.desc: Pack up and store luggage if flight is later.

morning.name: Last-minute shopping
morning.desc: Pick up souvenirs at Covent Garden or Oxford Street.

afternoon.name: Heathrow Express
afternoon.desc: Take fast train from Paddington to airport.

afternoon.name: Departure
afternoon.desc: Flight back to Philadelphia with amazing London memories.

days.tip: Arrive at Heathrow 3 hours before international flights and check if your purchases qualify for tax-free shopping.

food.intro: London's diverse food scene offers incredible vegetarian and Indian cuisine alongside traditional British fare.
food.tip: Most pubs serve excellent vegetarian food, and tipping 10-15% is standard for table service but not required for pub orders.

neighborhoods.name: Southwark
neighborhoods.whyStay: Walking distance to major attractions and excellent restaurants

neighborhoods.name: Covent Garden
neighborhoods.whyStay: Heart of London with easy access to everything

neighborhoods.name: Shoreditch
neighborhoods.whyStay: Vibrant arts scene and inclusive atmosphere

hotels.tip: Book hotels near tube stations for easy transport, and many offer complimentary WiFi and 24-hour room service.

getYourGuide.name: London Food Tour: Borough Market
getYourGuide.desc: Guided tasting experience through London's most famous food market.

getYourGuide.name: Thames River Evening Cruise
getYourGuide.desc: Romantic dinner cruise with live entertainment and city skyline views.

getYourGuide.name: Skip-the-Line Tower of London
getYourGuide.desc: Fast-track entry to see Crown Jewels and historic fortress.

hiddenGems.name: Leadenhall Market
hiddenGems.desc: Beautiful Victorian market featured in Harry Potter films.

hiddenGems.name: Neal's Yard
hiddenGems.desc: Colorful hidden courtyard perfect for photos and organic shopping.

hiddenGems.name: Sky Garden
hiddenGems.desc: Free panoramic views from London's highest public garden space.

packing.title: April London Packing Guide
packing.intro: Pack layers for mild spring weather with occasional rain showers and cool evenings.
packing.luggage: Pack in a medium suitcase with room for souvenirs and London shopping finds.
packing.tip: Pack comfortable walking shoes as you'll average 8-10 miles of walking per day exploring London.

bookTrip.intro: Flights from Philadelphia to London typically cost $650-850 per person in April.
